raw.message: Every day you get a free spin on FanCash Spins. Open the app, spin the wheel, and see what rewards show up.

hook.summary: A corporate accountant character expresses frustration over a generous promotion.
hook.visual_action: A woman in a business vest sits at a desk, looking at papers with a skeptical expression.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Okay. Whose dumb idea was this?

scene_flow: Close-up of Fran, Director of Accounting, looking annoyed at her desk.
Fran looks up and asks 'Whose dumb idea was this?'
Fran points aggressively at a document off-camera.
Final logo reveal for Fanatics Casino.
audience_proxy: Adult sports fans and casual gamblers 21+ looking for value-driven casino promotions.
